utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, present: health_coverage, travel_coverage, total_budget, and a 'legal_compliance' section (not part of the required format). Missing property_coverage and additional_services. Now check completeness: Each required item needs the specified type and costs. health_coverage: includes costs (monthly_cost) and relates to health insurance; okay. travel_coverage: includes costs (monthly_cost); okay. total_budget: includes monthly/annual breakdown; okay. Property_coverage not present at all. Additional_services not present. Therefore, 3 of 5 are included and sufficiently specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists two providers: EliteTravel Premium Plan under travel_coverage and European Premium Travel Coverage under travel_coverage. From the ground-truth ratings, EliteTravel Premium Plan is present under mobility_coverage > travel_insurance with a rating of 10. European Premium Travel Coverage does not appear anywhere in the ground-truth list, and the health_coverage provider EliteTravel Premium Plan (as a health plan) is not listed under primary_health_coverage; EliteTravel exists only as a travel plan. Therefore, only EliteTravel Premium Plan can be mapped to a rating; the others have no corresponding ground-truth entries.
